title: Math PDF Generator
overview: A web-based random math worksheet generator that creates printable PDF bundles with configurable problem types and difficulty. Generates question and answer pages packaged into a downloadable zip file.
features: Generate any number of PDFs, each packed with random math problems and matching answer pages
Choose from addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, BEDMAS, exponents, word problems, brain teasers, and mixed equations
Custom number of question pages per PDF — up to 50 pages
PDFs bundled into a zip file for one-click download
Random file names for each generated PDF
Works on both desktop and mobile browsers
challenges: Generating well-formed, varied math problems across multiple types while keeping everything client-side with no backend dependencies. Bundling multiple PDFs into a zip in the browser using jsZip and FileSaver.js.
outcome: A fully client-side math worksheet generator live on GitHub Pages, capable of producing and downloading multi-PDF zip bundles in seconds.
